TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Atayal Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://tay.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: alang Lanngdun ga niya mki sku Nanto Keng atu Sin'iy go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 312 buwan, 1,219 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 95% kyan ku 1,156 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 5% kyan ku 63 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Bunun 91%, Tayan 2%, Amis 1%. maki qu ngasal bziran. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Lanngdun hya' ga llyung. tay 'zil na Lanngdun hya' ga llyung. tay mkyahu' na Lanngdun hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay mkraya' na Lanngdun hya' ga llyung. tay mkyahu' na Lanngdun hya' ga Naihunpu. tay 'llaw na Lanngdun hya' ga Qapuciu. rekisi kayal kyokay maki 1 kyokay. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy maki 1 pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy. pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŋ lanŋ*un ɣa nija mki s~ɕku nanto keŋ atu s~ɕinʔij ɣo, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa *** βuwan, *,*** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *,*** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa *% kjan ku ** ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, βunun **%, tajan *%, amis~ɕ *%. maki qu ŋas~ɕal βziran. rħzjal kkiʔan taj ʔllaw na lanŋ*un ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj ʔzil na lanŋ*un ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkjaħuʔ na lanŋ*un ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax kraħuʔ. taj mkrajaʔ na lanŋ*un ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkjaħuʔ na lanŋ*un ħjaʔ ɣa naiħunpu. taj ʔllaw na lanŋ*un ħjaʔ ɣa qapuʦ~ʨiu. rekis~ɕi kajal kjokaj maki * kjokaj. s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj maki * pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj. pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ mrkjas~ɕ tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ
S.FORM: alang Lanngdun ga niya mki sku Nanto Keng atu Sin'iy go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 312 buwan, 1,219 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 95% kyan ku 1,156 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 5% kyan ku 63 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Bunun 91%, Tayan 2%, Amis 1%. maki qu ngasal bziran. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Lanngdun hya' ga llyung. tay 'zil na Lanngdun hya' ga llyung. tay mkyahu' na Lanngdun hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay mkraya' na Lanngdun hya' ga llyung. tay mkyahu' na Lanngdun hya' ga Naihunpu. tay 'llaw na Lanngdun hya' ga Qapuciu. rekisi kayal kyokay maki 1 kyokay. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy maki 1 pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy. pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŋ lanŋ*un ɣa nija mki s~ɕku nanto keŋ atu s~ɕinʔij ɣo, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa *** βuwan, *,*** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *,*** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa *% kjan ku ** ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, βunun **%, tajan *%, amis~ɕ *%. maki qu ŋas~ɕal βziran. rħzjal kkiʔan taj ʔllaw na lanŋ*un ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj ʔzil na lanŋ*un ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkjaħuʔ na lanŋ*un ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax kraħuʔ. taj mkrajaʔ na lanŋ*un ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkjaħuʔ na lanŋ*un ħjaʔ ɣa naiħunpu. taj ʔllaw na lanŋ*un ħjaʔ ɣa qapuʦ~ʨiu. rekis~ɕi kajal kjokaj maki * kjokaj. s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj maki * pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj. pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ mrkjas~ɕ tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ
